nasb.text: If the Lord is pleased with us, then He will bring us into this land and give it to us—a land which flows with milk and honey.

esv.text: If the Lord delights in us, he will bring us into this land and give it to us, a land that flows with milk and honey.

cnv.text: 耶和華若是喜悅我們，就必把我們領進那地，把那地賜給我們，那地原是流奶與蜜的地。

ccb.text: 如果耶和华喜悦我们，祂必把我们带到那片土地，将那奶蜜之乡赐给我们。
